introSection:
Jet Coaster (Japanese:ジェットコースター) was a steel roller coaster located at Nango Fisheries Center in Otsu, Shiga, Japan.

The coaster cost 300 JPY to ride.

sections.title: Operations
sections.content: As the station was built level, the ride operator (or in some cases a non-rider) would push the train to the lift, this was also to limit the impact when the train caught the lift chain.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: May have been the first roller coaster to use beam supports

fullText:
Jet Coaster (Japanese:ジェットコースター) was a steel roller coaster located at Nango Fisheries Center in Otsu, Shiga, Japan.

The coaster cost 300 JPY to ride.

As the station was built level, the ride operator (or in some cases a non-rider) would push the train to the lift, this was also to limit the impact when the train caught the lift chain.

May have been the first roller coaster to use beam supports
